item.title: Cooking Breakfast
item.description: Edit: there’s speculation on the location here. This is in Shaanxi province, a place called Weinan. Fly out there and get a nice sandwich. Tell them you want to try a 千层饼、老潼关肉夹馍. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Weinan Alternatively find your local Chinese grocery store and look for 千层饼 in the frozen section. tagged

item.title: $1,300,000,000,000 Company Needs You To Pay More (And watch adverts)
item.description: Piracy is like satire: Always punch up, never punch down. And in cases like this, with Amazon Prime and it's myriad of sub-subscriptions, it's morally correct. Especially if you're struggling to feed your family or heat your home.

item.title: Memes vol 233 Star Wars
item.description:
SCIENCE FICTION (oooh oooh oooh)
DOUBLE FEATURE
Ok so my friend had never seen Star Wars and so we organized a nerd night for him to watch it and y’all I’m terrible to watch movies with- Jesus Christ. I love to talk.
I LOVE revenge of the sith- fight me. Anakin is so hot in that one. That’s not the only reason I like it but like oh my word
Obi Wan, Leia, Lando, Poe, Padme, Chopper
I love him so much
CUZ I HAVENT HAD MY MUFFIN YET, MATT!!
Probably Aayla and that whole doomed romance
I saw this and it made me laugh so hard so I screenshotted it
That’s my boyfriend (I’ve never played)
I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry
My friend was watching it and he pointed to the little robot and goes “ITS A ROOMBA!!”
Froggy tax + me with my long hair
Scruffy tax
Nessie tax

item.dc:creator: Raider2187

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1073 (Bronze-age Blitz, part 2)
item.description:
I woke up sad. Almost crying. Exceedingly bizarre dreams. I was also promised that there would be water that came from the sky, and it did not come, and this aids in my unhappiness. Let us get this bread.
Yeah, there's a lot of our favorite copper merchant in this dump.
The Yanamaya steppe peoples were [probably] the ancestors of all other Indo-European peoples.
Thank GOD, that road was shit.
I had a thought here, but I decided to redact it.
This dump is partly inspired by the Greek mythology dump @danat101 did yesterday.
*spooky trumpets intensify*
Bronze Age-Wave
It may have been free real estate after what might have been the very first outbreak of Yersina Pestis, aka, the Black Death, if DNA bits found in teeth in a mass grave from around this time are any indication.
Ea-Naşir on Bashir.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Feral growling] "fuck. I love you too. Whatchoodoin?"
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Bottom shelf existential crisis dump.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo ( short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Anniversary of a meme
item.description:
In January 2005, a guy named Dave Roth was watching the local fire department practice with a real fire. He snapped a photo of her at the scene. Took awhile to go viral, but it sure did go viral.
This is her in 2020.
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.dc:creator: JdPilcher

item.title: Something a little different
item.description: The Bobivers is a series of first-person accounts of the adventures of a group of Von Neumann probes, self-replicating spacecraft integrating a machine-hosted copy of a human mind. Since the replication isn't perfect, the descendants become distinct individuals with their own agendas and priorities. Though the Bobs were originally charged with spreading humanity beyond Earth before its biosphere collapses, events in the first 3 books go way beyond the original mission statement. Alien first contacts and interstellar war, but also the freedom to explore the galaxy free of biological and economic restraints. I found the whole series genuinely enjoyable, but if you tried it and were turned off by the similarity of the original Bobs, you should consider reading the recent 4th book.
item.dc:creator: evenelectronicbrainpancakecrystalelderly

item.title: happy!
item.description: i really want to share with you guys how happy I am! things are going difficult in work but I am learning a lot but in the main course of life everything is ok! I don't know.. I Just felt a suddenly urgency to scream the void and tell the world that I am happy as things are in my life now. I have a road ahead to accomplish goals and hopefully share with you the milestones. keep it weird imgur! I have learned and enjoyed so many things with you, and I am grateful for that. Edit: it seems I used the wrong meme.. as some said.. I just liked the colors and the expression.. apparently I am late to the party knowing the correct use of this meme! LoL!
item.dc:creator: aycaramba

item.title: The 378th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - "SOUND ON! Videos A.F." Edition # 32
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Sorry about the cropping
Sorry about the cropping
Sorry about the cropping
Ope, no actual sound on these ones
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #SoundOn #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: There are dozens of us!
item.dc:creator: Raider2187

item.title: Seeing my home town as a tourist
item.description:
Growing up I always thought of my home town as dull and boring.
And to be fair, growing up there WAS dull and boring.
However, it was and still is a beautiful historic town.
Coming back after almost 20 years gave me the opportunity to see it again, this time as a tourist.
So this is me revisiting the places and corners I grew up around.
The historic old town is now a world heritage site.
Most houses were built in the 1500-1600s and survived largely unchanged to this day.
Back in the day property tax was charged based on a house's ground floor square footage. Hence, people built their houses with small ground floors and expanded the upper floors outwards, creating these unique and magnificent houses.
Some houses are more magnificent than others.
We even got a castle!
It was a popular place 1000 years ago. Today, not so much.
You get a good view from castle hill. And look - a rainbow!
This house is older than most and dates back to 1346. It doesn't look like much but I find it awe-inspiring to walk past this almost 700 year old house.
Yeah, we got a literal Hell. The town is Quedlinburg, Germany. You should come and have a look, it's not too bad! Edit: Most Viral, wohoo! Thanks, history and architecture nerds of Imgur!
item.dc:creator: ReallyCoolSlimeMold
